$comment: Config for demo-public-safety.html. The server base URL, glyphs, and hazard-layer definitions are NOT duplicated here — they come from the shared contract assets/demo/layers.json (read-only from this demo's point of view). This file declares only the public-safety-specific surface: the live-lane streaming contract, the geocoding locator contract, and replay assets. SEEDING CONTRACT for the live lane: the demo server must publish an incidents FeatureServer layer as serviceId `maui-incidents` layer 0 with change-feed streaming enabled, and a geocoding locator named `maui` at /rest/services/maui/GeocodeServer. Until then the page runs the bundled replay lane and shows graceful 'not yet enabled' chips.

live.$pathsComment: Paths are appended to layers.json server.baseUrl. capabilitiesPath is the boot probe; streamPath is the SSE endpoint (Accept: text/event-stream). Streaming is Pro-gated server-side: on a Community edition the capabilities probe returns 200 with {enabled:false, minimumEdition:'Pro'} (older builds returned 403), so the boot probe honors the `enabled` flag and renders a 'live feed: requires Pro (demo runs Community)' chip. An absent route (404) renders 'stream route not deployed' and a network error renders 'server unreachable'.

geocoding.$comment: Probed at boot via GET {baseUrl}/rest/services/{locatorName}/GeocodeServer?f=json. On 402/404/error the dispatch search falls back to the bundled GNIS fixture (places.json).

hazardLayers.$comment: Ids reference entries in assets/demo/layers.json. Flood polygons feed the incidents-in-flood-zone KPI and the geofence alert moment; when neither layer is seeded yet, the simulated advisory zones bundled in scenario.json stand in (clearly labeled).
